headline: How The DoorDash (DASH) Investment Story Is Shifting As Growth And Valuation Expectations Reset
summary: DoorDash’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly to US$258.00 from US$260.90, a small reset that still keeps the target in a similar range. Analysts link this move to sector wide pressure on multiples while acknowledging solid Q4 commentary around execution, Gross Order Volume trends, and reinvestment plans. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and mixed opinions can inform the way you track DoorDash’s evolving story and your own expectations. Stay updated as the...

headline: DoorDash's New App Turns Couriers Into AI Trainers
summary: This article first appeared on GuruFocus. DoorDash Inc. NASDAQ:DASH) has launched a new standalone app called Tasks that pays couriers to contribute to AI and robotics training.

headline: Why DoorDash (DASH) Stock Is Falling Today
summary: Shares of on-demand food delivery service DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) fell 4% in the afternoon session after a new Senate bill was introduced that would prevent food delivery platforms from creating special pricing deals with large chains that could harm smaller competitors.

headline: DoorDash Teams Up with Foot Locker, Kids Foot Locker, and Champs Sports for On-Demand Retail Delivery
summary: DoorDash and Foot Locker today announced a new retail partnership, bringing leading athletic footwear and apparel brands — Foot Locker, Kids Foot Locker, and Champs Sports — to the DoorDash Marketplace. Through this partnership, consumers can now shop a wide assortment of sneakers, apparel, and accessories for on-demand delivery directly through DoorDash.

headline: Seattle tried to guarantee higher pay for delivery drivers – here’s why it didn’t work as intended
summary: Base pay rose as intended, but the drivers’ total compensation, including tips, didn’t increase.
